name: Birkin 35 leather handbag
description:
This is an authentic HERMES courchevel Birkin 35 in ebene. Hermès Ébène (Ebony) is a deep, rich, and timeless dark brown shade, often considered the closest brown to black, making it a sophisticated, versatile neutral. It has subtle warm red or mahogany undertones, appearing as a dark espresso shade, and is highly regarded as a softer alternative to Noir.
This iconic handbag features rolled leather top handles, a front flap with strap closure, and polished gold plated hardware. The top flap opens to a matching brown chèvre leather interior with a zipper pocket and patch pockets. Stamp circle Z.
